productDisplayName: Rockport Men Jelbalp Black Flip Flops
description: Designed for the man who never compromises on style and comfort, this Jelbalp casual flip flop from rockport makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. Wear it all by itself on a warm day, or pair it with warm toe socks on a chilly day and revel in the comfort of luxurious leather.UpperSoft leather midfoot straps with a toe separator to lock the foot in placePadded fabric inner lining for the straps for abrasion-free comfortPadded suede footbed with stitch detailing for exemplary comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with strategically placed terraced lugs and grooved lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for easy movementSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to clean the footbedDo not store in direct sunlight
